memoryText: Baby Luna spent months conquering the living room by rolling and crawling. Then one Tuesday she pulled herself up on the sofa, let go, wobbled like a little penguin, and took her first three steps straight into Mama's arms while Papa cheered so loudly the neighbor's dog barked. Nothing in the house was safe after that.

people.name: Luna
people.appearance: a chubby-cheeked 1-year-old baby girl with wispy dark hair and one tiny curl on top, big dark eyes, wearing a mint-green onesie with a duck on the front

people.name: Mama
people.appearance: a woman in her early 30s with a messy honey-blonde bun and warm smile, wearing a soft grey sweater and jeans

greeting: For Luna — ten tiny steps, one giant adventure. We will catch you always.
